dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6761 IH: People’s White House Historic Preservation Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Raskin (for himself, Mr. Carson, Mr. Carter of Louisiana, Ms. Chu, Ms. Clarke of New York, Mrs. Watson Coleman, Mr. Davis of Illinois, Ms. Dean of Pennsylvania, Ms. Escobar, Mrs. Foushee, Mr. Garcia of California, Ms. Garcia of Texas, Mr. Goldman of New York, Mr. Hoyer, Mr. Huffman, Ms. Kamlager-Dove, Mr. Krishnamoorthi, Mr. Min, Ms. Moore of Wisconsin, Ms. Norton, Ms. Pingree, Mr. Pocan, Ms. Schakowsky, Mr. Takano, Ms. Titus, Mr. Thompson of Mississippi, and Ms. Velázquez) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources

form.official-title: To amend title 54, United States Code, apply certain National Historic Preservation Act requirements to the White House, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the People’s White House Historic Preservation Act.
Section 307104 of title 54, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking the White House or its grounds; and
by striking , or and inserting or.
